items.title: 🎤 Michael Jackson memorabilia to go up for auction in France
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Michael Jackson's gloves from the Bad tour, his hat and sequined jacket from the Victory tour, and a pillow embellished with crystals are among 50 items of memorabilia from the late singer that will be auctioned off near Paris on June 3.

#michaeljackson #memorabilia #auction #france #paris

items.title: Ex-Secret Service agent says Trump's security plan worked
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A former Secret Service agent said concentric layers of security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner worked, after a gunman was stopped and Trump was rushed out safely from the same hotel where Reagan was shot in 1981.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Singer-songwriter and actress Coco Jones told Reuters she is honored to be part of this year's Time 100 — and to be performing at it — calling it once in a lifetime opportunity she hopes to reflect in her music.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Ukraine marked the 40th anniversary of the Chornobyl nuclear meltdown, amid lingering fears that Russia's war could spark a repeat of the world's worst nuclear disaster that led to thousands of deaths and devastating environmental consequences.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Dinner guests described a chaotic scene as agents sprinted toward the stage where Trump was seated, prompting attendees to duck beneath tables amid the sound of shattering glass and clattering silverware, after an armed man tried to breach security.

items.title: Shots fired at the White House Correspondents Dinner | Reuters World News
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A gunman charges through security and fires shots at the White House Correspondents Dinner in Washington D.C., sending U.S. President Donald Trump and hundreds of guests diving for cover. Iran is demanding the United States lift its blockade on Iranian ports before any new talks can begin, as hopes of a diplomatic breakthrough begin to fade. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz sends condom prices soaring, going viral in China. Plus, how the protein-maxxing trend is throwing a lifeline to some American farmers.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: Suspected White House press dinner shooter charged
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The suspect, who was armed with two guns and multiple knives, opened fire on security personnel outside the White House Correspondents' Association dinner. He was taken into custody and is set to face multiple charges, authorities said.

items.title: Inside the White House correspondents' dinner after shooting
items.author: Reuters
items.content: <article>Reuters Correspondent Bo Erickson describes the moments after a man opened fire with a shotgun on security personnel at the White House correspondents' dinner. Erickson later asked President Trump if Secret Service agents acted quickly enough to rush him to safety, to which he replied: "I was very impressed by Secret Service."</article>

items.title: LIVE: Trump speaks after rushed from White House correspondents' dinner
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump makes an announcement following a security incident at White House Correspondents' Association Dinner, where he and first lady Melania Trump were ‌rushed away by Secret Service agents when loud bangs were heard. About an hour after Trump was rushed from the event, he posted on Truth Social that a "shooter had been apprehended."
 
#trump #donaldtrump #whca #dinner #whcadinner

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: Trump safe after being rushed from White House Correspondents' Association Dinner
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump were rushed out of the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner by Secret Service agents on Saturday night after loud bangs were heard.
 
A White House aide said Trump was safe after a freelance photographer working for Reuters heard four to six loud bangs in the hotel but not in the immediate vicinity of the dinner.
 
About an hour after Trump was rushed from the event, he posted on Truth Social stating that a "shooter had been apprehended."
 
#trump #donaldtrump #whca #dinner #whcadinner</article>

items.title: 🕯️ Doing 'House of Spirits' in Spanish is 'incredibly powerful,' actor says
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>More than four decades after it helped spread magical realism to a global audience, Chilean-American author Isabel Allende's novel "The House of the Spirits" will come to screens in Spanish for the first time next week. 

"The fact that it was filmed in Chile, in the language in which it was originally written, is incredibly powerful," said Mexican actor Alfonso Herrera, who plays patriarch Esteban Trueba.  

#houseofspirits #tvshow #novel #adaptation #spanish
